install: cd v2 && npm ci && npm --prefix frontend install --no-package-lock && python3 -m venv backend/.venv && backend/.venv/bin/pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && python3 -m venv mcp/.venv && mcp/.venv/bin/pip install -r mcp/requirements.txt -r mcp/tests/requirements.txt && mkdir -p backend/data src-tauri/binaries && TRIPLE=$(rustc -vV | sed -n 's/host: //p') && touch "src-tauri/binaries/trackeroo-backend-$TRIPLE" "src-tauri/binaries/trackeroo-mcp-$TRIPLE" && chmod +x "src-tauri/binaries/trackeroo-backend-$TRIPLE" "src-tauri/binaries/trackeroo-mcp-$TRIPLE"
